description: Week-over-week tier change history. Updated automatically by the build script each data refresh. Consumable at https://brawlrank.com/changelog.json

entries.label: April 28, 2026
entries.summary: Major overhaul. Every brawler now has a dedicated page with full source breakdowns, tier history context, and SEO metadata. Added source-detail modal with methodology and weight explanations. Added recency decay tooltip. Full redesign of layout, typography, and card system. Najia added to roster.

entries.label: April 27, 2026
entries.summary: Added Open Graph image for social sharing. BrawlRank links now show a preview card on Twitter, Discord, and other platforms.

entries.label: April 27, 2026
entries.summary: Added recency decay: sources not updated within 15 days lose weight exponentially (half-life 7 days). Prevents stale data from anchoring brawler scores when the meta has moved on.

entries.label: April 27, 2026
entries.summary: Added low-source warning: brawlers rated by fewer than 3 sources now show a caution indicator, making it clear when a placement is based on limited data.

entries.label: April 27, 2026
entries.summary: Removed Buzz Lightyear (not in current game roster). Updated SpenLC (April 22), Ash (April 26), Noff.gg (April 28 live), MmonsteR (April 2026), Driffle (April 2026). Damian rises to S tier with score 6.00.

tier_changes.note: New brawler — debuts at S tier (score 6.00, 3 sources)
New brawler — debuts at C tier (2 sources, low sample)
New brawler — debuts at C tier (2 sources, low sample)
Removed from roster — not in current game

entries.label: April 27, 2026
entries.summary: Full data refresh for April 27, 2026. Added Damian, Starr Nova, Bolt, and Buzz Lightyear. Updated all 9 sources.

entries.label: March 31, 2026
entries.summary: Updated KairosTime (March 31 community survey), SpenLC Season 49 (April 5), and minor source refreshes.
